scripts.build:cf: opennextjs-cloudflare build && sed -i '' 's/__ASSETS_RUN_WORKER_FIRST__: false/__ASSETS_RUN_WORKER_FIRST__: true/' .open-next/cloudflare/init.js && cp -r .open-next/cloudflare .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/middleware .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/server-functions .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/.build .open-next/assets/ && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/assets/_worker.js
